extraction_note: Primary colour #C90000 (red) confirmed in branding_json.colors.primary, buttonPrimary.background, buttonPrimary.borderColor, and link colour (#CC0000 is a near-duplicate and treated as the same brand red — only #C90000 retained as the canonical value). #428BCA (blue) appears in branding_json.colors.secondary but has no verifiable inline HTML evidence in the provided source; retained as supplementary JSON-sourced secondary with note of limited HTML validation. Background #F2F2F2 confirmed in branding_json.colors.background. Text black #000000 confirmed in branding_json.colors.textPrimary. White #FFFFFF confirmed in branding_json.components.buttonPrimary.textColor and buttonSecondary.textColor. Input field hex #112337 (dark navy text) appears only in branding_json.components.input.textColor — retained as form_text. Input border #686E77 appears only in branding_json.components.input — retained as form_border. colorScheme confirmed as light — HTML page content and background evidence (#F2F2F2) supports this. Fonts Maven Pro (body) and Poppins (heading) confirmed via branding_json.typography.fontFamilies; HTML source uses WordPress/Beaver Builder markup without explicit Google Fonts link tags visible in markdown, so both fonts marked as json_fonts source. No SVG gradient definitions found in the provided HTML source; gradients array is empty. Logo alt text 'ach-black-bold-red-hub-letters' confirms combination mark with black wordmark and red accent lettering. #CC0000 (link colour) is a near-duplicate of #C90000 and excluded from palette per anti-aliasing/near-duplicate rule — #C90000 serves as the canonical red.

palette.name: ACH Red
palette.usage: Primary CTA buttons ('Get a Quote', 'Talk to an Expert'), key call-to-action elements, brand accent on logo lettering. Use sparingly as the high-energy action colour.

palette.name: Light Grey Canvas
palette.usage: Page and section backgrounds, card surfaces, and infographic canvas base. Dominant neutral field.

palette.name: Pure Black
palette.usage: Primary body copy, headings on light backgrounds, and data labels.

palette.name: Pure White
palette.usage: Button text on red CTA buttons, text on dark or coloured backgrounds, secondary button text and border.

palette.name: Steel Blue
palette.usage: Secondary UI accents, links, supporting informational elements. Use to complement the red accent without competing with it.

palette.name: Mid Grey
palette.usage: Form field borders, dividers, subtle rule lines, muted text labels.

palette.name: White Surface
palette.usage: Card backgrounds, input field fills, white content panels sitting on the #F2F2F2 canvas.

colours.proportion_rule: 65% neutrals (#F2F2F2, #FFFFFF), 25% body text and structural black (#000000), 7% accent red (#C90000), 3% secondary blue (#428BCA)

backgrounds.light_variant: Solid #F2F2F2 light grey as dominant page canvas with #FFFFFF white card surfaces
backgrounds.dark_variant: Not prominently observed in source; no confirmed dark section background hex available

borders_and_rules.application: Form input field borders; secondary button outline (#FFFFFF border on transparent background)

decorative_elements: Pill-shaped CTA buttons with 25px border radius as a recurring interactive motif
Bold uppercase section headings creating strong visual hierarchy
Step-numbered milestone sequence (1–5) as structured process diagram element
Partner/certification logo strip (horizontal scrolling row of institution logos)

iconography.colour_usage: Icons and UI arrows appear inline with text; colour usage not explicitly defined in source — likely inheriting body black #000000 or accent red #C90000 based on context

data_visualisation.chart_aesthetic: Derived from brand patterns: clean minimal axes on #F2F2F2 background, no gridline clutter, black labels in Maven Pro body font, red #C90000 highlight for primary data series
data_visualisation.stat_callout_format: Large bold Poppins numeral in #C90000 or #000000 at 48–64px, supporting label in Maven Pro at 14–16px in #000000 or #686E77 beneath

brand_marks.logo_placement_convention: Top-left on page headers; combination mark with black 'ACH' wordmark and red 'Hub' accent lettering

brand_guardrails.avoid: Using gradients as a primary design element — no gradient definitions exist in the brand source
brand_guardrails.instead: Use flat solid fills from the defined palette: #C90000 for accent, #F2F2F2 and #FFFFFF for background surfaces, #000000 for text and structural elements

brand_guardrails.avoid: Dark or black-dominant canvas backgrounds that suggest a tech/dark-mode aesthetic
brand_guardrails.instead: Use light grey #F2F2F2 as the dominant canvas with white #FFFFFF card surfaces — the brand is a clean, professional light-scheme identity

brand_guardrails.avoid: Overusing red #C90000 as a fill — it is a functional CTA and accent colour, not a background or dominant field colour
brand_guardrails.instead: Reserve #C90000 for buttons, key numerical callouts, and single emphasis elements; keep it at approximately 7% of canvas coverage

brand_guardrails.avoid: Soft rounded corners (8–16px) on cards and containers that create a consumer/lifestyle feel
brand_guardrails.instead: Use sharp-to-minimal rounding (4px on containers) to reinforce the industrial and technical brand character; reserve 25px pill shape exclusively for CTA buttons

brand_guardrails.avoid: Decorative textures, noise/grain overlays, or illustrative elements that obscure the clean technical aesthetic
brand_guardrails.instead: Maintain flat, clean surfaces with ample white space; use photography of actual cleanroom environments as the illustrative element

brand_guardrails.avoid: Introducing new typefaces or font pairings beyond Poppins (headings) and Maven Pro (body)
brand_guardrails.instead: Use Poppins bold for all display and heading text, Maven Pro for all body copy and data labels

generation_suffixes.core: Clean industrial aesthetic on light grey #F2F2F2 canvas with white #FFFFFF panel surfaces, bold red #C90000 accent for emphasis elements, structured black #000000 typography in Poppins bold headings and Maven Pro body, sharp-to-minimal 4px corner radius on containers, pill-shaped red CTA elements, soft shadow depth, professional technical authority register.
generation_suffixes.infographic: Light grey #F2F2F2 infographic canvas with white #FFFFFF data panels, bold red #C90000 callout numerals in heavy-weight Poppins, Maven Pro labels in #000000, flat solid fills from brand palette (#428BCA for secondary data series), sharp geometric structure with 4px container rounding, minimal flat aesthetic with no gradients or textures, technical precision tone appropriate for cleanroom and engineering industry.
generation_suffixes.cover_image: Light grey #F2F2F2 background field with white #FFFFFF surface panels, bold red #C90000 applied to headline emphasis or accent band, display typography in heavy Poppins uppercase conveying industrial authority, Maven Pro supporting text in #000000, flat clean surfaces with soft shadow depth, no gradients or decorative textures, professional engineering sector tone with structured visual hierarchy.
generation_suffixes.social_square: Clean #F2F2F2 or #FFFFFF canvas with bold red #C90000 accent element, heavy Poppins uppercase headline in #000000 or white on red band, Maven Pro supporting copy in #000000, flat minimal aesthetic with 4px container geometry and pill-shaped red accent detail, technical and authoritative tone suited to B2B cleanroom and controlled environment engineering audience.
